<script type="text/javascript">
  const GLADLY_AVAILABLE = "AVAILABLE";
  const appId = "bark.co-play"

  function setupGladly() {
    if(!Gladly) {
      return;
    }
    // test comment for circle

    Gladly.init({ appId: appId}).then(() => {
      const today = new Date();
      const nextWeek = new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth(), today.getDate() + 7);

      Gladly.on("availability:change", function (availability) {
        triggerCustomEvent("chat-availability-change", {available: availability === GLADLY_AVAILABLE});
      });

      Gladly.on("sidekick:closed", () => {
        setCookie("chat_open", "0", { "expires": nextWeek, "path": "/" });

        triggerCustomEvent("chat-widget-toggled", { open: false });
      });

      Gladly.on("sidekick:opened", () => {
        setCookie("chat_open", "1");
        triggerCustomEvent("chat-widget-toggled", { open: true });
        const unreadMessagesCookieString = getCookie("unread_message_count");
        const unreadMessagesCount = unreadMessagesCookieString ? parseInt(unreadMessagesCookieString) : 0;

        setCookie("unread_message_count", 0, { "expires": nextWeek, "path": "/" });
      });

      Gladly.on("message:received", () => {
        triggerEvent("chat-message-received");
        const unreadMessageCookieValue = getCookie("unread_message_count");
        const unreadMessagesCount = unreadMessageCookieValue ? parseInt(unreadMessageCookieValue) : 0;
        const chatOpen = getCookie("chat_open") === "1";
        if (!chatOpen) {
          setCookie("unread_message_count", unreadMessagesCount + 1, { "expires": nextWeek, "path": "/" });
        }
      });

      if (current_user?.email && current_user?.full_name && getCookie("gladly_user_set") !== "1") {
        try {
          Gladly.setUser({
            email: current_user.email,
            name: current_user.full_name,
          })
          setCookie("gladly_user_set", "1", { "expires": nextWeek, "path": "/" });
        } catch (error) {
          // This error is expected when the user is logged in. Gladly only allows setting the user once,
          // but this is the most centralized way to set/clear the user so we do it here and just rescue the errors.
        }
      }

      const availability = Gladly.getAvailability();
      triggerCustomEvent("chat-availability-change", { available: availability === GLADLY_AVAILABLE});
    })
  }

  if (Gladly) {
    setupGladly();
  } else {
    setTimeout(setupGladly, 1000);
  }
</script>
